---
title: "Schedule"
format:
  html:
    toc: True
---
## Agenda
| Time (PST) | Topic | Materials |
|---|---|---|
| 09:00–09:10 | Welcome & Introductions | [Home](index.qmd) |
| 09:10-09:20 | Human-Centric AI | [1-Intro](01_intro.qmd) |
| 09:20–09:40 | Introduction to Deep Learning | [1-Intro](01_intro.qmd) |
| 09:40–10:00 | Data Preparation and Loading | [2-Data](02_data.qmd) |
| 10:00-10:15 | Training Deep Learning Models | [3-Train](03_train.qmd) |
| 10:15–10:30 | Break | NA |
| 10:30–10:45 | Training Deep Learning Models | [3-Train](03_train.qmd) |
| 10:45–11:15 | Evaluating Deep Learning Models | [4-Evaluation](04_evaluation.qmd) |
| 11:15–11:50 | Examples of Deep Learning Forest Inventory Products | [5-Examples](05_examples.qmd) |
| 11:50–12:00 | Question & Answer | NA |
